biography: From the greens of Vantaan Golfpuisto, Jonas contributed to the competitive spirit of the Hector Trophée through his two participations. His engagement in this unique pairs competition, spanning two separate editions, showcased his resolve on the challenging fairways.

Across these two tournaments, Jonas consistently applied himself to the demanding multi-day format. While he did not ultimately secure the coveted Hector Trophée for the victorious pair, nor claim the individual Victor Trophy, his presence underscored a genuine commitment to the sport and the unique challenges presented by the event.

As the Hector Trophée 2026 approaches, Jonas is currently considered to have concluded his active involvement in Hector events. His dedicated participation, though not culminating in ultimate victory, added to the competitive fabric of the tournament, leaving a respected mark on its historical chronicle.
